text:
Once there was an old woman who could hear sounds. She could hear things.

An old woman who could hear birds.

A cat.

A mouse. Maybe--

Her eyes flutter.

And she knows.

There’s something good.

Just maybe. Just maybe. Something good.

An old woman’s heart.

That’s all you know.

That’s all you know. Whatever it knows.

And somehow.

It knows.

That somehow.

That’s something.

That’s ancient.

That’s wisdom.

That’s ancient.

That’s everything.

That’s what.

That’s life.

That’s heartbeat.

That’s thought.

That’s existence.

Just breathe.

Just breathe.



Just breathe.

That’s what you know.

That’s just background noise.

That’s something even.

A gentle.

A gentle...

I don words. I.

That.

That...

That’s it.

That's life.

That's thought.

That's reality.

That's physics.

That's science.

That's physics.

That's science.

That
